creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
DiscoverBSD/awesome-bsd: A collection of awesome BSD related stuff
<https://github.com/DiscoverBSD/awesome-bsd#readme>

At and under <https://github.com/DiscoverBSD/awesome-bsd#bsd-news> (the second section of the Awesome BSD page) there's _at least_ one useful support resource that's not yet at the FreeBSD page: 

* dmesgd
